zh.lifeSummary: 當Marian Mary Ann Woodward於大約1527年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親William Woodward18歲，母親Catherine Roper19歲。她於1579年7月與George Vessey在英國英格蘭爾維亞福哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她於1579年住在英國爾瓦維頓。她去世於1607年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾哈登哈姆享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marian Mary Ann Woodward于大约1527年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲William Woodward18岁，母亲Catherine Roper19岁。她于1579年7月与George Vessey在英国英格兰爾維亞福哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她于1579年住在英国爾瓦維頓。她去世于1607年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾哈登哈姆享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Marian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval variant spelling of   Marion .  However, in the 18th century, when combined names began to come into fashion, it was sometimes understood as a combination of   Mary   and   Ann .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Marian Mary Ann Woodward was born about 1527, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Woodward, was 18 and her mother, Catherine Roper, was 19. She married George Vessey in July 1579, in Weaverham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She lived in Waverton, Cheshire, England in 1579. She died in 1607, in Haddenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marian Mary Ann Woodward est née environ 1527, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Woodward, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Catherine Roper, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé George Vessey en juillet 1579, à Weaverham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1579. Elle est décédée en 1607, à Haddenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

Sie hat im Juli 1579 in Weaverham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom George Vessey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1579 hat sie in Waverton, Cheshire, England gelebt. Lei sposato George Vessey nel luglio 1579, nel Weaverham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Waverton, Cheshire, England nel 1579. ko.Oxford, Suffolk, England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 스퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Marian Mary Ann Woodward(이)가 대략 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Woodward(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Roper(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1579년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 위버함에서 George Vessey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1579년도에 영국 체실르 와버턴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1607년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 하데함에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com George Vessey em julho de 1579, em Weaverham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela viveu em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1579. ru.Oxford, Suffolk, England: оксфорд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marian Mary Ann Woodward родилась около 1527 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Woodward было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Roper, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Vessey июль 1579 г. в местности вивирам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она жила в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия в 1579 году. Она умерла в 1607 г. в местности хадденам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.
